sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khazih kazuat lai kihhuai mah ta leng,
Hong ki siangsak ta sisan muang peuh leng
(Vang liatna a om vangliatna a om
Ka mawhna pitawh Zeisu kazuan a.
Kongkhak kakiu a, kei hong lutsak ta.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mangthang mite aw, keitawh paikhawm ni,
Zeisu sisan in hong siangsak zota,
